title: [MTR4] MF77
description: This ressource pack adds the MF77 to MTR
body:
**Version 2.0 out !**

This ressource pack adds the famous Paris metro **MF77** to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.

**MTR necessited**, tested on version 4.0 or higher only
!
Enjoy it, I spend a lot of time making it...

**Ressource pack also integrated into the [MTR France Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-france-addon) ! Check it out !**

**Open the spoiler below to know how to make your consist :**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 3 cars train :
  
  MF77 *[Variant name]* M (Avant)
  
  MF77 *[Variant name]* B (Remorque non motrice)
  
  MF77 *[Variant name]* M (Arrière)

- 5 cars train :
  
  MF77 *[Variant name]* M (Avant)
  
  MF77 *[Variant name]* B (Remorque non motrice)
  
  MF77 *[Variant name]* NA (Remorque motrice)
  
  MF77 *[Variant name]* B (Remorque non motrice)
  
  MF77 *[Variant name]* M (Arrière)


</details>

**Included liveries :**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- The original RATP "Blanc" livery
- The famous RATP "Vert Jade" livery
- The renovated version of the Ligne 13
- The brand new IDFM livery

</details>




![MF77 RATP "Blanc" Livery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e37a29d4e5f2bb2e049839946146b1d0520263c8.png)
